    static boolean
    fullyPassable(CalculationContext context, int x, int y, int z)
    canWalkThrough but also won't impede movement at all. so not including doors or fence gates (we'd have to right click), not including water, and not including ladders or vines or cobwebs (they slow us down)

    • fullyPassable

      public static boolean fullyPassable(CalculationContext context, int x, int y, int z)
      canWalkThrough but also won't impede movement at all. so not including doors or fence gates (we'd have to right click), not including water, and not including ladders or vines or cobwebs (they slow us down)

    • fullyPassable

      public static boolean fullyPassable(CalculationContext context, int x, int y, int z, int blockStateId)

    • fullyPassable

    • avoidWalkingInto

      public static boolean avoidWalkingInto(Block block)

    • canWalkOn

      public static boolean canWalkOn(int x, int y, int z, int blockStateId)
      Can I walk on this block without anything weird happening like me falling through? Includes water because we know that we automatically jump on water

      If changing something in this function remember to also change it in precomputed data

      参数:
      x - The block's x position
      y - The block's y position
      z - The block's z position
      返回:
      Whether or not the specified block can be walked on

    • canWalkOnBlockState

      public static Ternary canWalkOnBlockState(int blockStateId)

    • isWater

      public static boolean isWater(Block block)
      Returns whether or not the specified block is water, regardless of whether or not it is flowing.

    • isWater

      public static boolean isWater(BlockPos bp)
      Returns whether or not the block at the specified pos is water, regardless of whether or not it is flowing.
      参数:
      bp - The block pos
      返回:
      Whether or not the block is water

    • isLava

      public static boolean isLava(Block block)

      public static boolean isLiquid(BlockPos p)
      Returns whether or not the specified pos has a liquid

      返回:
      Whether or not the block is a liquid
